THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/12/19 IS CONTINUED TO 2/24/20 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE NEW TRIAL DATE OPERATES AS THE INITIAL TRIAL DATE FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING CONDUCTING DISCOVERY, FILING AND SERVING DISCOVERY OR SUMMARY JUDGMENT MOTIONS AND ANY OTHER RELEVANT CUT-OFF DATES.
